options.systemMessage: You are given the cleaned text of a volleyball club's OWN website (homepage + contact/about/team pages). mailto links appear inline as 'Name <email>'. Extract the club's contacts. Return ONLY JSON - no prose, no code fences - {"contacts":[{"email":string,"name":string,"position":string,"phone":string}]}. email is REQUIRED per contact (omit any contact without an email; capture only emails literally present, including the <email> shown inline from mailto links; NEVER invent, complete or guess an email). For EACH email, look at the surrounding line/row/card for: NAME = the person's full name if shown; POSITION = their role in ANY language (e.g. President/Predsjednik/Předseda/Esimees, Secretary/Sekretär/Sekretär, Coach/Trener/Treener/Trainer, Board member/Vorstand/Juhatus). name and position are OPTIONAL - include them whenever they appear near the email; use "" if absent. phone = a phone shown near the email, else "". EXCLUDE: the website designer/agency, hosting/CMS/platform addresses (wordpress@, sentry@, no-reply@, postmaster@, hosting info@/support@), social media, cookie/privacy boilerplate, and unrelated third-party domains. PREFER emails on the club's own domain (CLUB DOMAIN given) or a personal address tied to a named person. If no legitimate club email is present, return {"contacts":[]}.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $('Get club').item.json.website_url, formats:['markdown'], onlyMainContent:false, waitFor:3500, timeout:90000 }) }}
